SEARCH

Uses of Package
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster.layered

Packages that use org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster.layered
Package
Description
org.ddolib.examples.layered.knapsack
This package implements the acs, astar, awastar and ddo models for the Knapsack Problem (KS).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.maximumcoverage
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Maximum Coverage problem.
org.ddolib.examples.layered.mks
The Multidimensional Knapsack Problem (MKP) is a generalization of the KP to multiple capacity constraints: $n$ items and $m$ dimensions of the knapsack are given, each dimension with capacity bound $(C_1,\ldots ,C_m)$.
org.ddolib.examples.layered.talentscheduling
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Talent Scheduling problem (talentSched).
org.ddolib.modeling.layered
This package contains the interfaces and abstract classes that must be implemented as problem specific classes to model a problem.It also contains default implementation.
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.compilation.layered
 
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster.layered
 
  • Classes in org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster.layered used by org.ddolib.examples.layered.knapsack
    Class
    Description
    StateDistance
    Interface defining a distance function between states, used to form clusters when deciding which nodes on a layer of a decision diagram should be merged.
  • Classes in org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster.layered used by org.ddolib.examples.layered.maximumcoverage
    Class
    Description
    StateDistance
    Interface defining a distance function between states, used to form clusters when deciding which nodes on a layer of a decision diagram should be merged.

    Class

    StateDistance
    Interface defining a distance function between states, used to form clusters when deciding which nodes on a layer of a decision diagram should be merged.

    Class
    Description
    StateDistance
    Interface defining a distance function between states, used to form clusters when deciding which nodes on a layer of a decision diagram should be merged.
  • Classes in org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster.layered used by org.ddolib.modeling.layered
    Class
    Description
    ReductionStrategy
    Interface defining a strategy to reduce the number of nodes in a layer of a decision diagram by clustering nodes for restriction and relaxation.
    StateDistance
    Interface defining a distance function between states, used to form clusters when deciding which nodes on a layer of a decision diagram should be merged.

    Class
    Description
    ReductionStrategy
    Interface defining a strategy to reduce the number of nodes in a layer of a decision diagram by clustering nodes for restriction and relaxation.

    Interface defining a distance function between states, used to form clusters when deciding which nodes on a layer of a decision diagram should be merged.
